testcase.name: PromoCodeInput > renders input and validate button
PromoCodeInput > converts input to uppercase
PromoCodeInput > disables validate button when code is empty
PromoCodeInput > validates promo code successfully
PromoCodeInput > shows error for invalid promo code
PromoCodeInput > shows error on validate API failure
PromoCodeInput > redeems promo code after validation
PromoCodeInput > shows error on redeem failure
PromoCodeInput > disables input and button when disabled prop is true
PromoCodeInput > handles Enter key to validate
PromoCodeInput > clears validation when code changes
cn utility function > basic functionality > should return empty string for no arguments
cn utility function > basic functionality > should return single class
cn utility function > basic functionality > should join multiple classes
cn utility function > basic functionality > should filter out falsy values
cn utility function > conditional classes > should handle conditional object syntax
cn utility function > conditional classes > should handle mixed syntax
cn utility function > conditional classes > should handle multiple conditional objects
cn utility function > array handling > should handle array of classes
cn utility function > array handling > should handle nested arrays
cn utility function > array handling > should handle mixed array and strings
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting padding classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting margin classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting text color classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting background classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting width classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should merge conflicting height classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should keep non-conflicting classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should handle rounded classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should handle flex classes
cn utility function > tailwind merge functionality > should handle display classes
cn utility function > real-world use cases > should handle button variant classes
cn utility function > real-world use cases > should handle conditional disabled state
cn utility function > real-world use cases > should handle responsive classes
cn utility function > real-world use cases > should handle hover and focus states
cn utility function > real-world use cases > should handle className override pattern
cn utility function > edge cases > should handle empty string
cn utility function > edge cases > should handle only whitespace
cn utility function > edge cases > should handle number zero
cn utility function > edge cases > should not deduplicate identical non-tailwind classes
useAuthStore > initial state > should have null token
useAuthStore > initial state > should have null user
useAuthStore > initial state > should have null currentOrg
useAuthStore > initial state > should have empty organizations
useAuthStore > setAuth > should set token and user
useAuthStore > setAuth > should handle user without optional fields
useAuthStore > setOrganizations > should set organizations
useAuthStore > setOrganizations > should auto-select first org if none selected
useAuthStore > setOrganizations > should not change currentOrg if already selected
useAuthStore > setOrganizations > should handle empty organizations array
useAuthStore > setCurrentOrg > should set current organization
useAuthStore > setCurrentOrg > should handle org with logo_url
useAuthStore > logout > should clear all auth state
useAuthStore > isAuthenticated > should return false when no token
useAuthStore > isAuthenticated > should return true when token exists
useAuthStore > isAuthenticated > should return false after logout

Channel Store > fetchChannels > should fetch channels successfully
Channel Store > fetchChannels > should pass filters to API
Channel Store > fetchChannels > should handle empty response
Channel Store > fetchChannels > should handle fetch error
Channel Store > fetchChannel > should fetch single channel successfully
Channel Store > fetchChannel > should handle fetch error
Channel Store > createChannel > should create channel successfully

Channel Store > createChannel > should handle create error
Channel Store > updateChannel > should update channel successfully
Channel Store > updateChannel > should not update currentChannel if different id
Channel Store > updateChannel > should handle update error
Channel Store > archiveChannel > should archive channel successfully
Channel Store > archiveChannel > should handle archive error
Channel Store > unarchiveChannel > should unarchive channel successfully
Channel Store > unarchiveChannel > should handle unarchive error
Channel Store > fetchMessages > should fetch messages successfully
Channel Store > fetchMessages > should append messages when offset > 0
Channel Store > fetchMessages > should replace messages when offset is 0
Channel Store > fetchMessages > should handle fetch error
Channel Store > sendMessage > should send message successfully
Channel Store > sendMessage > should send message with podKey
Channel Store > sendMessage > should handle send error
Channel Store > joinChannel > should join channel and refresh
Channel Store > joinChannel > should handle join error
Channel Store > leaveChannel > should leave channel and refresh
Channel Store > leaveChannel > should handle leave error
Channel Store > setCurrentChannel > should set current channel
Channel Store > setCurrentChannel > should clear messages when setting channel
Channel Store > setCurrentChannel > should set to null
Channel Store > addMessage > should add message to list
Channel Store > addMessage > should append to existing messages
Channel Store > clearError > should clear error
IDE Store > initial state > should have default values
IDE Store > activity bar > should set active activity
IDE Store > activity bar > should support all activity types
IDE Store > sidebar > should set sidebar open state
IDE Store > sidebar > should set sidebar width
IDE Store > sidebar > should toggle sidebar
IDE Store > bottom panel > should set bottom panel open state
IDE Store > bottom panel > should set bottom panel height
IDE Store > bottom panel > should set bottom panel tab
IDE Store > bottom panel > should toggle bottom panel
IDE Store > mobile state > should set mobile drawer open state
IDE Store > mobile state > should set mobile more menu open state
IDE Store > hydration > should set hydration state
Activity Configuration > ACTIVITIES constant > should have all required activities
Activity Configuration > ACTIVITIES constant > should have labels for all activities
Activity Configuration > ACTIVITIES constant > should have icons for all activities
Activity Configuration > getMobileActivities > should return only mobile visible activities
Activity Configuration > getMobileActivities > should be sorted by mobile order
Activity Configuration > getMobileActivities > should not include settings or runners
Activity Configuration > getMoreMenuActivities > should return non-mobile visible activities
Activity Configuration > getMoreMenuActivities > should include settings and runners
Mesh Store > initial state > should have default values
Mesh Store > fetchTopology > should fetch topology successfully
Mesh Store > fetchTopology > should handle fetch error
Mesh Store > fetchTopology > should handle non-Error rejection
Mesh Store > selectNode > should select a node
Mesh Store > selectNode > should clear selectedChannel when selecting node
Mesh Store > selectNode > should set to null
Mesh Store > selectChannel > should select a channel
Mesh Store > selectChannel > should clear selectedNode when selecting channel
Mesh Store > selectChannel > should set to null
Mesh Store > clearError > should clear error
Mesh Store > getNodeByKey > should find node by key
Mesh Store > getNodeByKey > should return undefined for non-existent key
Mesh Store > getNodeByKey > should return undefined when topology is null
Mesh Store > getEdgesForNode > should find edges for source node
Mesh Store > getEdgesForNode > should find edges for target node
Mesh Store > getEdgesForNode > should return empty array for node with no edges
Mesh Store > getEdgesForNode > should return empty array when topology is null
Mesh Store > getChannelsForNode > should find channels for node
Mesh Store > getChannelsForNode > should return empty array for node with no channels
Mesh Store > getChannelsForNode > should return empty array when topology is null
Mesh Store > getActiveNodes > should return only running and initializing nodes
Mesh Store > getActiveNodes > should include initializing nodes
Mesh Store > getActiveNodes > should return empty array when topology is null

Helper Functions > getPodStatusInfo > should return correct info for running status
Helper Functions > getPodStatusInfo > should return correct info for paused status
Helper Functions > getPodStatusInfo > should return correct info for terminated status
Helper Functions > getPodStatusInfo > should return correct info for failed status
Helper Functions > getPodStatusInfo > should return terminated info for unknown status

Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for thinking status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for coding status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for testing status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for reviewing status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for waiting status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return correct info for error status
Helper Functions > getAgentStatusInfo > should return fallback for unknown status
Helper Functions > getBindingStatusInfo > should return correct info for active status
Helper Functions > getBindingStatusInfo > should return correct info for pending status
Helper Functions > getBindingStatusInfo > should return correct info for revoked status
Helper Functions > getBindingStatusInfo > should return correct info for expired status
Helper Functions > getBindingStatusInfo > should return active info for unknown status
useOrganizationStore > initial state > should have empty organizations
useOrganizationStore > initial state > should have null currentOrganization
useOrganizationStore > initial state > should have empty members
useOrganizationStore > setOrganizations > should set organizations
useOrganizationStore > setCurrentOrganization > should set current organization

useOrganizationStore > updateOrganization > should not update currentOrganization if different id
useOrganizationStore > removeOrganization > should remove organization from list
useOrganizationStore > removeOrganization > should clear currentOrganization if removed
useOrganizationStore > removeOrganization > should not clear currentOrganization if different id

useOrganizationStore > member management > addMember > should add member
useOrganizationStore > member management > updateMember > should update member by user_id
useOrganizationStore > member management > updateMember > should not update non-matching member
useOrganizationStore > member management > removeMember > should remove member by user_id
useOrganizationStore > setLoading > should set loading state
useOrganizationStore > setError > should set error
useOrganizationStore > reset > should reset to initial state
Pod Store > initial state > should have default values
Pod Store > fetchPods > should fetch pods successfully
Pod Store > fetchPods > should pass filters to API
Pod Store > fetchPods > should handle empty response
Pod Store > fetchPods > should handle fetch error
Pod Store > fetchPods > should use default error message when no message provided
Pod Store > fetchPod > should fetch single pod successfully
Pod Store > fetchPod > should handle fetch error
Pod Store > createPod > should create pod successfully
Pod Store > createPod > should convert camelCase to snake_case for API
Pod Store > createPod > should use default agent_type_id when not provided
Pod Store > createPod > should add new pod to beginning of list
Pod Store > createPod > should handle create error
Pod Store > terminatePod > should terminate pod successfully
Pod Store > terminatePod > should only update the terminated pod
Pod Store > terminatePod > should not update currentPod if different key
Pod Store > terminatePod > should handle terminate error
Pod Store > setCurrentPod > should set current pod
Pod Store > setCurrentPod > should set to null
Pod Store > updatePodStatus > should update pod status in list
Pod Store > updatePodStatus > should update currentPod status if matching
Pod Store > updatePodStatus > should not update currentPod if different key
Pod Store > updatePodStatus > should not affect other pods
Pod Store > updateAgentStatus > should update agent status in list
Pod Store > updateAgentStatus > should update currentPod agent status if matching
Pod Store > updateAgentStatus > should not update currentPod if different key
Pod Store > clearError > should clear error

Runner Store Actions > setCurrentRunner and updateRunnerStatus > should clear current runner

Runner Store Actions > setCurrentRunner and updateRunnerStatus > should keep available runners when status is online

Runner Store Helper Functions > getRunnerStatusInfo > should return correct info for offline status
Runner Store Helper Functions > getRunnerStatusInfo > should return correct info for maintenance status
Runner Store Helper Functions > getRunnerStatusInfo > should return correct info for busy status
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return true for online runner with available slots
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return false for offline runner
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return false for maintenance runner
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return false for busy runner
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return false when at max capacity
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return false when over max capacity
Runner Store Helper Functions > canAcceptPods > should return true with zero current pods

Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should return "Unknown" for empty host_info
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format os only
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format arch only
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format cpu_cores only
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format memory only
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format all fields
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should format partial fields
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should handle small memory values
Runner Store Helper Functions > formatHostInfo > should handle large memory values

useUserStore > initial state > should have isLoading false
useUserStore > initial state > should have null error
useUserStore > setProfile > should set profile
useUserStore > setProfile > should set profile to null
useUserStore > updateProfile > should update profile fields

useUserStore > updateProfile > should do nothing if profile is null

useUserStore > addIdentity > should do nothing if profile is null
useUserStore > removeIdentity > should remove identity by provider
useUserStore > removeIdentity > should only remove matching provider

useUserStore > setLoading > should set loading to false
useUserStore > setError > should set error message
useUserStore > setError > should clear error

Workspace Store > panes management > should add a new pane
Workspace Store > panes management > should use custom title when provided
Workspace Store > panes management > should generate default title from podKey
Workspace Store > panes management > should return existing pane id if pod already open
Workspace Store > panes management > should remove a pane
Workspace Store > panes management > should set next pane as active when active pane is removed
Workspace Store > panes management > should clear all panes
Workspace Store > active pane > should set active pane
Workspace Store > active pane > should set active pane to null
Workspace Store > grid layout > should set grid layout
Workspace Store > grid layout > should update pane position
Workspace Store > mobile state > should set mobile active index
Workspace Store > mobile state > should not set invalid mobile active index
Workspace Store > terminal settings > should set terminal font size
Workspace Store > terminal settings > should clamp font size to minimum
Workspace Store > terminal settings > should clamp font size to maximum
Workspace Store > getPaneByPodKey > should find pane by podKey
Workspace Store > getPaneByPodKey > should return undefined for non-existent podKey
Workspace Store > hydration > should set hydration state
Terminal Connection Pool > getStatus > should return 'none' for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > isConnected > should return false for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > getConnection > should return undefined for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should create a new WebSocket connection
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should reuse existing connection for same podKey
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should not replay buffer to new listener on existing connection (backend sends scrollback)
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle WebSocket open event
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle WebSocket message event with ArrayBuffer
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle WebSocket message event with string
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should limit buffer size
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle WebSocket error event
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle WebSocket close event
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle missing auth data gracefully
Terminal Connection Pool > connect > should handle invalid auth data JSON
Terminal Connection Pool > send > should send data through WebSocket
Terminal Connection Pool > send > should not send when WebSocket is not open
Terminal Connection Pool > sendResize > should send resize command through WebSocket after debounce
Terminal Connection Pool > sendResize > should not send resize when WebSocket is not open
Terminal Connection Pool > sendResize > should not send resize for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > removeListener > should remove listener from connection
Terminal Connection Pool > removeListener > should do nothing for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > disconnect > should close WebSocket and remove connection
Terminal Connection Pool > disconnect > should not close WebSocket if already closed
Terminal Connection Pool > disconnect > should do nothing for non-existent connection
Terminal Connection Pool > disconnectAll > should disconnect all connections
Terminal Connection Pool > isConnected > should return true when connected and WebSocket is open
Terminal Connection Pool > isConnected > should return false when status is connected but WebSocket is not open
Terminal Connection Pool > isConnected > should return false when status is error

Button Component > rendering > should render as a button element
Button Component > variants > should apply default variant styles
Button Component > variants > should apply secondary variant styles
Button Component > variants > should apply destructive variant styles
Button Component > variants > should apply outline variant styles
Button Component > variants > should apply ghost variant styles
Button Component > variants > should apply link variant styles
Button Component > sizes > should apply default size styles
Button Component > sizes > should apply sm size styles
Button Component > sizes > should apply lg size styles
Button Component > sizes > should apply icon size styles

Button Component > loading state > should disable button when loading
Button Component > loading state > should still show children when loading
Button Component > loading state > should not show spinner when not loading
Button Component > disabled state > should be disabled when disabled prop is true
Button Component > disabled state > should apply disabled styles
Button Component > disabled state > should not call onClick when disabled
Button Component > events > should call onClick when clicked
Button Component > events > should not call onClick when loading
Button Component > className prop > should apply custom className
Button Component > className prop > should merge custom className with base classes
Button Component > ref forwarding > should forward ref to button element

Button Component > HTML attributes > should pass through aria attributes
Button Component > HTML attributes > should pass through data attributes

Input Component > rendering > should render with value

Input Component > types > should render email input
Input Component > types > should render password input
Input Component > types > should render number input
Input Component > types > should render search input
Input Component > error state > should show error message when error prop is provided
Input Component > error state > should apply error styles to input

Input Component > error state > should not show error message when no error
Input Component > error state > should render error message with correct styling
Input Component > disabled state > should be disabled when disabled prop is true
Input Component > disabled state > should apply disabled styles
Input Component > events > should call onChange when value changes
Input Component > events > should call onFocus when focused
Input Component > events > should call onBlur when blurred
Input Component > events > should call onKeyDown when key is pressed
Input Component > className prop > should apply custom className

Input Component > HTML attributes > should pass through required attribute

Input Component > HTML attributes > should pass through data attributes
Input Component > wrapper element > should render wrapper div with full width

TerminalGrid > Empty State > should not render 'Open Terminal' button when onAddNew is not provided
TerminalGrid > Empty State > should apply custom className to empty state

TerminalGrid > 1x1 Layout > should not render PanelGroup in 1x1 layout
TerminalGrid > 1x1 Layout > should apply custom className to 1x1 layout

TerminalGrid > 1x2 Layout (Two Columns) > should render resize handle (separator)

TerminalGrid > 2x1 Layout (Two Rows) > should render PanelGroup with vertical orientation

TerminalGrid > 2x2 Layout (Four Grid) > should render multiple separators for 2x2 layout

TerminalGrid > Empty Pane Slots > should not render Add Terminal button in empty slot when onAddNew is not provided

TerminalGrid > Pane Interactions > should call onPopout when popout button is clicked
TerminalGrid > Pane Interactions > should not render popout button when onPopout is not provided
TerminalGrid > Pane Interactions > should pass correct isActive prop to TerminalPane

TerminalGrid > Visible Panes Calculation > should show first panes when no active pane
TerminalGrid > Visible Panes Calculation > should show first panes when active pane is not found

TerminalGrid > ResizeHandle Component > should render vertical resize handle with correct classes

TicketCard Component > events > should not propagate click from identifier link

TicketDetail Component > editing > should enter edit mode when edit button is clicked

TicketDetail Component > delete action > should close modal when cancel is clicked
request > should make a GET request with authorization headers
request > should make a POST request with body
request > should make a PUT request
request > should make a DELETE request
request > should not include Authorization header when no token
request > should not include X-Organization-Slug header when no currentOrg
request > should handle empty response
request > should throw ApiError for non-ok response
request > should handle error response with no JSON body
request > should merge custom headers
ApiError > should create an error with correct properties
ApiError > should work without data
orgPath > should return org-scoped path
orgPath > should throw error when no organization selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should render credential select when agent is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should render credential profiles in select
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should call setSelectedCredentialProfile when changed
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should show runner host hint when runner host profile is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should show custom credential hint when custom profile is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > credential selection > should show loading state for credentials
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > repository selection > should render repository select when agent is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > repository selection > should render repositories in select
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > repository selection > should call setSelectedRepository when changed
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > repository selection > should call setSelectedRepository with null when deselected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > branch input > should render branch input when repository is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > branch input > should not render branch input when no repository is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > branch input > should call setSelectedBranch when changed
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > branch input > should show branch validation error
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > prompt textarea > should render prompt textarea when agent is selected
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > prompt textarea > should use custom placeholder when provided
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > prompt textarea > should call setPrompt when changed
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > config options > should show loading state for config
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > config options > should render config form when config fields are available
CreatePodForm - Agent Configuration > config options > should not render config form when no config fields available
CreatePodForm > rendering > should render loading state when data is loading
CreatePodForm > rendering > should render runner select when data is loaded
CreatePodForm > rendering > should show no runners message when no runners available
CreatePodForm > rendering > should show agent select after runner is selected
CreatePodForm > rendering > should show no agents message when runner has no supported agents
CreatePodForm > rendering > should apply custom className to container
CreatePodForm > runner selection > should call setSelectedRunnerId when runner is selected
CreatePodForm > runner selection > should call setSelectedRunnerId with null when deselected
CreatePodForm > runner selection > should show runner validation error
CreatePodForm > agent selection > should call setSelectedAgent when agent is selected
CreatePodForm > agent selection > should show agent validation error
CreatePodForm > form submission > should call submit with correct parameters
CreatePodForm > form submission > should pass ticketId when in ticket scenario
CreatePodForm > form submission > should disable create button when no runner selected
CreatePodForm > form submission > should show loading state on create button when submitting
CreatePodForm > cancel button > should render cancel button when onCancel is provided
CreatePodForm > cancel button > should call onCancel when clicked
CreatePodForm > cancel button > should not render cancel button when onCancel is not provided
CreatePodForm > error handling > should display form error when present
CreatePodForm > error handling > should call onError when submission fails
CreatePodForm > form reset on disable > should reset form when enabled changes from true to false
CreatePodForm > form reset on disable > should not reset form when enabled stays true
CreatePodForm > default prompt initialization > should initialize prompt with default value for ticket scenario
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should return empty string when no ticket context
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should generate prompt with ticket identifier and title
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should include description when provided
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should truncate long descriptions to 500 characters
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should not truncate descriptions under 500 characters
presets > ticketPromptGenerator > should handle exactly 500 character descriptions
presets > workspacePromptGenerator > should always return empty string
presets > getScenarioPreset > should return ticket preset for ticket scenario
presets > getScenarioPreset > should return workspace preset for workspace scenario
presets > getScenarioPreset > should default to workspace preset for unknown scenario
presets > mergeConfig > should merge user config with preset
presets > mergeConfig > should preserve user-provided promptGenerator
presets > mergeConfig > should use preset promptGenerator when user does not provide one
presets > mergeConfig > should preserve all user config properties
RepositoriesPage > loading state > should show loading spinner initially
RepositoriesPage > rendering > should render page title
RepositoriesPage > rendering > should render page description
RepositoriesPage > rendering > should render Import Repository button
RepositoriesPage > rendering > should render stats cards
RepositoriesPage > rendering > should show correct stats values
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should render all repositories
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show full path for each repository
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show inactive badge for inactive repositories
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show private badge for private visibility repositories
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show ticket prefix badge when available
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show default branch for each repository
RepositoriesPage > repository list > should show provider type for each repository
RepositoriesPage > filtering > should filter repositories by search text
RepositoriesPage > filtering > should filter repositories by provider type
RepositoriesPage > filtering > should show empty state when no matches
RepositoriesPage > delete functionality > should call delete API when delete button clicked and confirmed
RepositoriesPage > delete functionality > should not call delete API when cancelled
RepositoriesPage > empty state > should show empty state when no repositories
RepositoriesPage > empty state > should show help text in empty state
RepositoriesPage > import modal > should open import modal when Import Repository clicked
RepositoriesPage > import modal > should close import modal when Cancel clicked
RepositoriesPage > import modal > should show repository providers in import modal
RepositoriesPage > import modal > should show manual entry option
RepositoriesPage > import modal > should show message when no providers available
RepositoriesPage > links > should link to repository detail page
RepositoriesPage > links > should have View button linking to detail page
RepositoriesPage > error handling > should handle API errors gracefully
RepositoryDetailPage > loading state > should show loading spinner initially
RepositoryDetailPage > not found state > should show not found message when repository not found

testcase.name: RepositoryDetailPage > not found state > should show back button when not found

testcase.name: RepositoryDetailPage > rendering > should render repository name
RepositoryDetailPage > rendering > should render repository full path
RepositoryDetailPage > rendering > should render Edit and Delete buttons
RepositoryDetailPage > rendering > should render breadcrumb
RepositoryDetailPage > rendering > should render tabs
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show repository details section
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show default branch
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show clone URL
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show ticket prefix
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show active status
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show git provider info from self-contained fields
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show visibility
RepositoryDetailPage > information tab > should show actions section
RepositoryDetailPage > branches tab > should switch to branches tab
RepositoryDetailPage > branches tab > should show message about Git credentials for branch listing
RepositoryDetailPage > delete functionality > should call delete API when Delete clicked and confirmed
RepositoryDetailPage > delete functionality > should navigate to repositories list after delete
RepositoryDetailPage > delete functionality > should not delete when cancelled
RepositoryDetailPage > webhook setup > should call setupWebhook API when button clicked
RepositoryDetailPage > webhook setup > should show alert with webhook info
RepositoryDetailPage > edit modal > should open edit modal when Edit clicked
RepositoryDetailPage > edit modal > should close edit modal when Cancel clicked
RepositoryDetailPage > edit modal > should call update API when save clicked
RepositoryDetailPage > inactive repository > should show Inactive badge for inactive repository
RepositoryDetailPage > private visibility repository > should show Private badge for private visibility repository
RepositoryDetailPage > different providers > should show GitLab provider type
RepositoryDetailPage > different providers > should show Gitee provider type
